title: Fix suppressing errors on unreachable (by parameter value) code

features.name: unreachable code with backward part-select range
features.description: Code should include a parameter-dependent conditional where an unreachable branch contains a variable part-select with backward range ordering (e.g., signal[PARAM-1:96] which becomes [63:96] when PARAM=64)

features.name: variable part-select with parameter-based start index
features.description: Code should include a variable part-select using a parameter expression as the start index where the resulting range may have backward ordering for certain parameter values
